name: Epsom Salt Bath
description: Magnesium sulfate dissolved in bath water for transdermal magnesium absorption — standard sports recovery recommendation for muscle soreness, tension, and relaxation.
replaces: Muscle rubs, bath bombs, recovery products ($5–15)
effectivenessNote: Well-established in sports medicine for muscle recovery. Transdermal magnesium absorption is supported by some evidence. The warm water soak itself provides therapeutic benefit independent of magnesium.
warnings: Use 2 cups per bath, soak for 20 minutes minimum
Do not use Epsom salt in laundry — hardens water
People with kidney problems should consult a doctor before frequent use
Hot baths may lower blood pressure — stand up slowly
scienceNote: Magnesium sulfate provides magnesium (muscle relaxation via calcium channel regulation) and sulfate (supports detoxification and joint health). The osmotic properties reduce inflammation. Standard post-exercise recovery protocol in sports medicine.
